issues.detail: Instructions lack step-by-step guidance and are not specific for the agent.
Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for deployment and data queries.
Using a shortened URL in curl command may lead to malicious redirects.

scenarios.name: create-products-crud-interface
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes a modal and a JSObject for validation (though not named exactly), whereas Response B lacks any validation logic; both miss the date‑range requirement, but A is slightly more complete.

scenarios.name: setup-appsmith-k8s-git-sync
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers almost all rubric items except the localhost URL, while Response B fails to provide the correct Helm repo URL and install command, missing key requirements.
